g.text: Skills/SOPs are treated as hypotheses and updated from verified agent trajectories.
Full self-evolving: run all tasks and evolve skills online.
Incremental repair: read base-agent failures and rerun only failed tasks.
Incremental repair: 6 failed tasks rerun, 6/6 repaired to reach 100%
Notation: C = inference condition, h_i = Skill/SOP hypothesis, theta = model parameters, e_t = verified trajectory evidence.
For each skill h_i: Beta(alpha_i, beta_i), contexts, costs, failure modes
Split, retire, or explore when evidence demands it
